name: Black Forest Trifle Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1/2 package Devil's Food cake mix (Package directions)
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------
Prepare the cake mix according to package directions and cut into 1/2 inch slices.
1. Line the bottom of a 2-quart bowl or trifle dish with half of the cake slices.
- Sprinkle with 2-4 tablespoons of rum.
2. Spoon half of the cherry pie filling over the cake slices.
3. Add half of the chocolate pudding on top.
4. Repeat steps 1-3 with the remaining cake slices, rum, cherry pie filling, and chocolate pudding.
5. Cover and chill the trifle.
6. Beat whipping cream until foamy.
7. Gradually add powdered sugar to the whipped cream, beating until soft peaks form.
8. Spread the whipped cream over the custard layer.
9. Garnish with sliced almonds.
This dessert yields 6-8 servings.
